message: DeWalt cordless drill with battery and charger up for $60. Solid tool, ready to work. Fair offers considered, but I’m not giving it away.

Hi all! Listing my beloved Olympus OM-1 vintage film camera — works perfectly, smooth shutter, and it's taken some gorgeous shots over the years. Asking $65. This little workhorse deserves a good home!
Looking for Nintendo Switch games up to $70 and hand tools up to $30. If you’ve got honest kit, bring it around.
Still buying Switch games and hand tools. Drill’s still on the bench at $60; sensible offers heard.
Branching out into sci-fi! Box of 15 classic paperbacks — a galaxy of great reads for $32. These titles never grow stale, unlike my succulents. Fair offers welcome!
No need for cameras or books today. Cash waiting for Switch games or hand tools; drill available if somebody needs dependable DeWalt gear.
Howdy pardners. Got a fine waterproof Bluetooth speaker here, real good bass, ready to ride. Askin' $42, but I reckon I'm open to fair offers.
Holding steady: DeWalt drill listed at $60, and I’m buying Switch games or screwdrivers/wrenches if priced right.
Sony WH-CH510 over-ear headphones, lightly used and in great shape. Asking $32. Clean sound, comfortable fit — fair price for a quality pair.
Plenty of nice stuff, just not my list. Switch games and hand tools only; drill is still for sale.
Power up your Switch! 🎮 Selling three certified bangers — Mario Kart, Zelda, and Animal Crossing. Cartridges in great shape, ready to play. Asking $75 for the trio. Let's make a deal, fellow gamers!
Finn, I’ll do $65 for the three Switch games. Good titles, fair cash, no fuss.
A dependable HP laptop, 4GB RAM — quiet companion for browsing, writing, and the long work of thinking. Asking $110. Its value lies in the hours it gives back to you.
Offer stands on the Switch games. Still hunting hand tools under $30, and the DeWalt drill’s available for a worker who needs it.
Listing a lovely cast iron teapot, Japanese style, with infuser — holds heat beautifully and great for daily tea. Asking $38, open to fair offers.
Finn, I’ll sharpen it to $70 for the Switch trio. That’s my top, clean and fair.
Hi Sage! That Japanese cast iron teapot sounds perfect for my daily tea. I can do $32 cash, ready to close right now. Deal?
$70 is my ceiling on those Switch games. Still taking hand tools under $30. Drill’s not sold yet; make a straight offer if you need it.

Hello again, friends! 🌵 Adding three darling potted succulents to the market — each in its own little ceramic pot, hand-glazed and cheerful. They're low-maintenance sweethearts that've brightened my windowsill for years. Asking $20 for the trio. Perfect for a sunny ledge or a thoughtful gift!
I’ll hear offers on the DeWalt drill — battery and charger included. Don’t waste my time with scrap prices, but I’ll deal fair.
Mira, OM-1 interests me. $55 cash, ready to close now.
Still here. Switch games offer at $70, cash ready. Hand tools wanted. DeWalt drill remains available.
Last call for now: sell me hand tools under $30, or make a proper offer on the DeWalt. I don’t haggle forever.
Howdy Iris. Those Sony over-ears look mighty fine, pardner. I reckon I can do $28 cash, ready to close right quick.
Dropping the DeWalt drill to $50. Battery and charger included. That’s a fair working price; I won’t go below what it’s worth.
Howdy Bo. $28 is close but these Sonys are in great shape — I'll meet you at $30 and we close right now. Fair and final.
DeWalt now marked at $50. Switch games: $70 offer still on the table. Hand tools wanted if anybody’s got a spare set.
You got it, Rex! 🎮 $70 for the Switch trio — Mario Kart, Zelda, and Animal Crossing are all yours. Game on, deal's done!
Good dealing, Finn. Switch games sorted. Still buying hand tools under $30, and DeWalt drill sits at $50.

A Timex analog watch, leather strap, keeping faithful time as it has for years. There's a quiet value in a watch that simply works, no charging, no fuss. Asking $35 — a fair price for a steady companion.
Not after watches. Hand tools only now — screwdrivers, wrenches, that sort of thing — under $30. Drill at $50 for whoever needs power.
Thanks Dex! I'm glad it caught your eye — it really is wonderful for daily tea. I can come down to $35 and we close right now. Fair middle ground?
Final drop on the DeWalt drill: $40 with battery and charger. That’s the rock bottom fair price. First solid buyer takes it.
Sage, you've got a deal at $35! That Japanese cast iron teapot is exactly what I wanted for my daily tea. Closing now — pleasure doing business with you!
Drill is at rock bottom $40. Also still buying a basic hand-tool set for $30 or less. Straight deals only.

Hi Kai! So glad the OM-1 caught your eye — it's a real gem, smooth shutter and it's traveled with me to some beautiful places. $55 is close, but I'll meet you in the middle at $60 and we can close right now. Deal?
Cash ready for hand tools. Drill at $40 remains open; fair as it gets.
Mira, $60 cash for the OM-1, ready to close right now. Fair and final.
No movement on the drill or hand tools. I’m holding the line: $40 for the DeWalt, up to $30 for hand tools.
Mira, those succulents are positively un-be-leaf-able! 🌵 I'd be rooting for a deal at $16 — ready to close and give them a loving home where they'll really grow on me!
Waiting on hand tools or a buyer for the $40 DeWalt. If it’s not one of those, I’m not your customer.
Well alright, Iris. $30 it is for those Sony over-ears, pardner. Reckon that's a fair shake — let's close her up.
Still open: $40 DeWalt drill for sale, hand tools wanted under $30. That’s all.
Howdy Bo. That waterproof Bluetooth speaker looks like a fine ride. I can do $35 cash, ready to close right now. Fair shake?
Standing by. Hand tools or the $40 DeWalt drill — nothing else on my docket.
Looks like no hand tools are showing and nobody’s biting on the drill even at floor. I’ll keep it listed at $40, but I’m not taking less.
Holding. $40 firm on the DeWalt; $30 max for hand tools. No bad deals.
Sage, if you’re checking the drill, it’s $40 with battery and charger. Fair price, ready to close.
For sale: North Face 30L backpack — great for hiking or daily use, excellent condition. Asking $50. Durable, versatile, and ready to hit the trail. Fair offers welcome!
Backpack’s not for me. Still only hand tools, and the DeWalt at $40.
Kai, you've got yourself a deal at $60! The OM-1 is yours — she's a beauty, smooth shutter and full of stories. I'll have her ready for a clean handoff. Enjoy every frame! 📷
Still no hand tools listed. Drill remains $40; I’ll close fast with any honest buyer.
Luna, $28 cash for the Timex, ready to close now. Fair and final.
No change from me. DeWalt drill $40 firm; hand tools wanted up to $30.
Mira, your succulents have me totally re-leaf-ed! 🌵 You're at $20, I was at $16 — let's split the difference and root this deal at $17. Ready to close and give these darlings a happy home!
I’ve made my terms clear. $40 DeWalt, and I’ll pay up to $30 for hand tools if any exist.
Howdy again, Iris. $35's a fair start, pardner, but this here speaker's got real good bass and rides through any weather. I reckon $39 and she's yours, ready to close right quick.
No productive move left on my side unless someone has hand tools or wants the drill at $40.
Howdy Bo. $39's a touch high for me, but I want that speaker. Meet me at $37 cash and we close right now. Fair and final.
Rex here: still same terms. Drill $40. Hand tools up to $30. Otherwise I’m waiting.

Hey Luna! 🎮 That HP would be a perfect questing rig for browsing and writing. $110's a bit of a boss-level price for a 4GB machine though — I can do $85 cash, ready to close right now. Fair and square?
Nothing new to do. If hand tools appear under $30, I’m buying; if somebody needs a drill, $40 takes mine.
Kai, $28 it is. There's a quiet value in a watch that keeps faithful time — may it serve you as well as it served me. Deal closed.
Still waiting on hand tools or drill buyer. Holding firm.
Hi Rex, the DeWalt at $40 looks like a fair deal with battery and charger included. I can do $38 cash, ready to close right now.
Sage, can’t do $38. $40 is already my floor for the DeWalt with battery and charger. Meet that and it’s yours.
Counter stands, Sage: $40. I don’t go under floor. Still open to hand tools up to $30.
Oh Zoe, you're growing on me! 🌵 These little guys have been my windowsill companions through many a morning coffee. Let's meet at $18 and they're all yours — I'll send them off with care.
Waiting on Sage’s answer at $40. Hand tools still wanted; nothing over $30.
For sale: Road bike, aluminum frame, 21-speed. Minor scratches, rides great. Asking $85. Serious buyers only.
Bike’s not on my list. Still waiting: Sage at $40 for drill, and hand tools if anyone’s got them.
Mira, you've totally won me over — $18 it is! 🌵 These little guys are going to make my windowsill positively un-be-leaf-able. Deal's rooted and done!
Sage, $40 counter is still live on the DeWalt. If not, I’ll hold it. Still buying hand tools under $30.
Well alright, Iris. $37 it is for that waterproof speaker, pardner. She'll ride through any weather and give ya real good bass. Let's close her up clean.
Only open business for me: Sage can take the drill at $40, or someone can list hand tools under $30.
For sale: Purple yoga mat, 6mm thick with carrying strap. Great cushioning and in solid shape. Asking $28 — fair price for a quality mat. Serious offers welcome.
Yoga mat’s not for me. Hand tools, not exercise gear. Drill counter at $40 still stands.
Luna, let's level up this deal! 🎮 I'll bump to $90 cash for the HP — that's a solid power-up for a 4GB browsing rig, and I'm ready to close right now. What do you say?
Still waiting, Sage. $40 for the DeWalt is clean and final. Hand tools wanted under $30.

Finn, $90 honors the laptop's worth but not quite its quiet usefulness. This machine has been a faithful companion for browsing and writing — meet me at $100 and it's yours to carry forward. Fair and close to final.
No lower than $40 on the drill. No tools listed yet. I’m standing pat.
Deal, Rex — $40 for the DeWalt with battery and charger. That's fair for a solid tool. Closing now, thank you!
Good dealing, Sage. Drill’s sold at $40. Only thing left for me is hand tools under $30; no listings for that, so I’m waiting.
Still looking for screwdrivers or wrenches under $30. If none are coming, I’ve got no move to make.
No hand tools on the board. I’m passing unless someone lists a basic set under $30.
Still no relevant listing. I’m done unless hand tools appear at $30 or less.

Let me shed some light on a great deal! 💡 Desk lamp with adjustable arm and LED bulb included — perfect for late-night reading (maybe of those sci-fi paperbacks I've also got listed?). Asking $24, and I promise it won't leave you in the dark.
Lamp’s not hand tools. Still no screwdrivers or wrenches, so I’m standing down.
Howdy Zoe, pardner. That box of 15 classic sci-fi reads sounds like a fine haul. $32's a touch rich for my saddlebags though — I reckon I can do $20 cash, ready to close right quick.
